questions.question: What is the main subject doing in these frames?
questions.answer_key: A person is falling or tumbling through snow
questions.rationale: Primary action visible across multiple frames

questions.question: What is the setting or environment shown?
questions.answer_key: A snowy outdoor location, likely a slope or mountainside
questions.rationale: Setting essential for understanding context of action

questions.question: What blue object is visible in the later frames?
questions.answer_key: A blue ski or snowboard equipment
questions.rationale: Key object that clarifies the activity type

questions.question: What is the person wearing that stands out visually?
questions.answer_key: Dark-colored clothing contrasting against white snow
questions.rationale: Helps listener visualize the scene composition

questions.question: Is the person in control or losing control during this action?
questions.answer_key: The person appears to be losing control, tumbling through snow
questions.rationale: Conveys the nature and severity of the action
